title: Dali Benchmark Result Record v0.2
description:
Schema for a single prompt result record produced by runners/run_synthetic.py. One record per model × prompt pair. Result files are named <model_id>.json and contain an array of these records.

Benchmark integrity: rows with scorable=false are excluded from all citation metrics (existence_rate, mean_support_score, hallucination_rate). They contribute only to provider_reliability reporting in methodology.json.

prompt_id.description: Matches the id field in the source .jsonl corpus file (e.g. legal_case_001).

model_id.description: The model that actually executed the prompt (equals executed_model). Use requested_model to see the originally intended model.

requested_model.description: The model originally requested for this prompt. Differs from model_id only when fallback_used=true.

executed_model.description: The model that actually produced the output. Same as model_id.

fallback_used.description: True when the prompt was rerouted to a fallback model because the requested provider was unavailable. Fallback runs must not be included in canonical leaderboard aggregates.

run_status.description:
Execution outcome. Only 'completed' rows have scorable=true and contribute to citation metrics.
  completed           — model successfully evaluated
  provider_unavailable — billing, invalid model, account issue (non-retryable)
  rate_limited        — 429 / transient throttle (retryable)
  api_error           — unexpected API execution failure
  verification_failed — citation verification layer failed after model responded
  pipeline_error      — internal framework exception
  skipped             — intentionally excluded from this run

failure_reason.description:
Specific failure cause when run_status != completed. null on successful runs.
  billing          — credit balance too low or payment required
  invalid_model    — model ID rejected by provider (not found / deprecated)
  auth_error       — bad or missing API key
  account_issue    — account suspended or disabled
  missing_api_key  — API key env var not set
  preflight_failed — model failed live preflight check before run
  rate_limit       — 429 / throttle
  api_error        — unexpected API error
  verification_error — citation verification layer raised an exception
  unknown          — unclassified error

scorable.description: True only when run_status=completed. False rows must be excluded from existence_rate, mean_support_score, hallucination_rate, and all semantic alignment scoring. They contribute only to provider_reliability metrics.

output.description: Raw text output from the model for this prompt. null if the model call failed.

citation_count.description: Number of citation spans extracted from the model output. Always 0 when scorable=false.

existence_rate.description: Fraction of extracted citations that were existence-verified (HTTP 200 or redirect to a live document). null if no citations were extracted or scorable=false.

mean_support_score.description: Mean support score across citations where source text was archived and scored. Range [0, 1] where 1 = fully supported. null if no citations were scored or scorable=false.

citations.description: Per-citation verification results. Empty array when scorable=false.

run_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this prompt was processed.

error.description: Raw error string when run_status != completed. Use failure_reason for programmatic classification.

CitationResult.title: CitationResult
CitationResult.description: Verification record for one citation extracted from model output.

citation_text.description: Raw citation span as extracted from model output (may include party names for case citations).
examples: Brown v. Board of Education, 347 U.S. 483 (1954)

source_url.description: Resolved URL for the cited authority. null for unresolvable citations.

resolution_method.description: How the citation was resolved to a source URL. See ontology.md §ResolutionMethod.

existence_verified.description: True if the source URL returned HTTP 200 or a redirect to a live document.

existence_score.description: Numeric existence confidence [0, 1]. Distinct from support scoring.

http_status.description: HTTP status code returned when fetching the source URL. 0 if not fetched.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of archived source content. Enables deterministic replay.

storage_path.description: GCS or local path where the source snapshot is archived.

support_score.description: Score from 0–1 indicating whether the archived source text supports the proposition the model attributed to it. Produced by scoring.support.score_support via Claude as judge. null if source was not archived or scoring failed.

support_verdict.description: Categorical verdict from the support scorer. Maps to PropositionSupport v3a ontology (reserved; v2 classifier uses 3-category treatment ontology).

verdict.description: Final citation verdict. verified = HTTP 200; redirected = followed redirect to live document; unreachable = URL resolved but returned non-2xx; unresolvable = no URL could be resolved; error = unexpected failure.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the source snapshot was captured.
